subject: [SDNC] Update chart with service account
commit_message:
[SDNC] Update chart with service account

Add service account to requirements.yaml, values.yaml and deployment/statefulset

Issue-ID: OOM-2719
Change-Id: I9d0bb6b1602713666495920f79d95392c825eb16
Signed-off-by: farida azmy <farida.azmy.ext@orange.com>
